data.title: Trump once again threatens to fire Powell ahead of Senate confirmation for Warsh as Fed chair.
data.description: Prior to Kevin Warsh's Senate confirmation hearing to become the Federal Reserve chair, a new threat has emerged against the current Fed chair. Warsh, nominated by President Trump for the position, is set to lead the central bank amid this escalating concern.

data.title: Forsyth Advisors Celebrates 15th Year Anniversary
data.description: St. Louis-based company Forsyth Advisors recently reached a significant milestone by celebrating its 15-year anniversary. Since its humble beginnings as a two-person startup, the company has expanded its operations globally and now boasts a team of operators dedicated to delivering tangible value. This achievement underscores the company's commitment to operational excellence and building a team that is highly focused on execution.

data.title: Cloud Microphones Announces Get Lifted Artist Tournament Bracket; Fan Voting Opens Today
data.description: Sixteen individual artists have progressed to the Round of 16 where they will compete for the opportunity to collaborate with Bob Horn, a Grammy Award-winning mix engineer. Additionally, individuals who vote will be entered for a chance to win Cloud products. This event is being hosted by Cloud Microphones, a company headquartered in Tucson, Arizona. The announcement was made on April 15, 2026, through a press release.

data.title: Jones Appoints Soumit Roy, PhD, as Managing Director, Investment Banking
data.description: In an announcement made on April 15, 2026, JonesTrading Institutional Services LLC revealed the hiring of Soumit Roy, PhD, as the new Managing Director of Investment Banking. This move aims to enhance the firm's expertise in Investment Banking and Equity. Roy's appointment signifies a notable addition to Jones' team in Los Angeles and New York.

data.title: DartPoints Strengthens Leadership Team with Construction and Financial Planning Appointments
data.description: DartPoints, a prominent regional provider of colocation, cloud, and interconnection solutions, has revealed their recent hires to assist in the company's upcoming phase of capacity expansion, capital planning, and execution. The announcement includes the appointment of Chris Baldwin as Senior... The news was shared on April 15, 2026, in Dallas.

data.title: Signal Labs Launches With $25M in Early Contract Value, Defines New “Systems of Attention” Category
data.description: A startup called Signal Labs based in San Francisco has officially launched its platform, SignalOS™, aimed at assisting enterprises in recognizing crucial signals within their operations. The company revealed securing a total contract value of $25 million and received support from Lightspeed Venture Partners. Signal Labs emphasized that their goal is to aid large corporations in pinpointing key signals, directing them to appropriate decision-makers, and enhancing decision-making processes during critical moments. Additionally, they disclosed that Ap will play a key role in their operations.

data.title: Kevin Warsh owns Solana, Polymarket, and others. Goldman Sachs applies for a BTC ETF while Circle stock rises on token update.
data.description: Kevin Warsh has invested in Solana, Polymarket, and other ventures. Goldman Sachs is seeking approval for a Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF). Share prices of Circle have surged following an announcement regarding a new token.

data.title: Storyliving by Disney Brings New Magic to North Carolina
data.description: Residents of the Asteria community in Pittsboro, North Carolina will have the opportunity to join the Second Star Club, featuring locally inspired spaces and Disney-designed experiences. Storyliving by Disney recently shared updates on this exclusive club, catering to Asteria residents.

data.title: EMPAVA Breaks the Status Quo in At-Home Cold Therapy
data.description: A new single-basin cold therapy solution is now available for residential wellness spaces. Empava has launched the Smart WiFi Indoor/Outdoor Cold Plunge Tub, a self-contained recovery system. This system is designed to offer professional-grade recovery benefits. The introduction was made in Los Angeles on April 15, 2026.

data.title: My Place Hotels Debuts Loyalty Rewards on Pet Fees with Launch of My Pet Points
data.description: In Aberdeen, South Dakota, on April 15, 2026, My Place Hotels of America announced the introduction of My Pet Points through a recent press release. This new addition to the Stay Rewarded® loyalty program enables members to accumulate 10 points for every dollar spent on pet fees during an eligible stay. This initiative aims to enhance the benefits offered to customers and further incentivize loyalty within the brand's loyalty program.

data.title: Gunderson Capital Management Joins GCG Advisory Partners Platform
data.description: GCG Advisory Partners, based in Charlotte, NC, has formed a partnership with Bill Gunderson, an investor and nationally syndicated radio personality. This collaboration aims to establish GCG's Fee-Only RIA Channel. The announcement was made on April 15, 2026, marking a significant move for GCG Wealth Management. This strategic partnership indicates GCG's commitment to expanding its services and reach in the financial sector. The specifics of the partnership, such as investment size and duration, were not disclosed.
